action.description:
Introduced by Senators Drake, L. Johnson, Carpenter, Ratcliff, Roys, Larson and Spreitzer; 
cosponsored by Representatives Stubbs, Taylor, Haywood, Arney, Moore Omokunde, Madison, Rivera-Wagner, Goodwin, Roe, DeSmidt, Udell, Bare, Neubauer, Palmeri, Hong, Clancy, Fitzgerald, Joers, Miresse and Phelps
